rulings.Case Title: GARY TSIFRIN ET AL VS. IAN DUGGAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Dismissal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 24, 2018 line 1. PETITIONERs GARY TSIFRIN, FRANCESCA WONG-TSIFRIN, JEFF WINTER, and CLAUDIA WINTER's Motion To Set Aside Dismissal Motion for relief from failure to file opposition to motion to Dismiss is GRANTED per CCP 473(b). No later than May 11, 2018 Daron Tong shall remit to Clark Hill LLP $2,600 in reasonable attorney's fees and costs to compensate for extra work and costs caused by Mr. Tongs failure to file a timely opposition. Responded may set its motion to dismiss for hearing per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Petitioner is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. = (501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS. MICHAEL WILLIAMS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Vacate Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 24, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT MICHAEL WILLIAMS's Motion To Vacate Judgment DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain his burden under CCP 473(b) and under CCP 1008. While the motion does not indicate exactly what the basis for the motion is, it can be reasonably inferred that Defendant attempted to set the judgment aside based on surprise, mistake, excusable neglect or sought reconsideration of the order granting ex-parte for entry judgment. = (501/SRB)
